queue.title: Add DI to handleQualityCheck for unit testability
queue.description: handleQualityCheck uses execSync and process.exit directly, making it impossible to unit test. Add a deps parameter for execSync and process.exit (or return exit code instead).

outcome.note: Added deps param with execSync/exit DI, return codes. 6 unit tests (pass/fail/missing-text/cwd/argv-position). Baseline 18→23 tests.

queue.title: Add E prehook integration test for Check 8 (Colony JWT)
queue.description: Check 8 (Colony JWT freshness) was added in wq-803 but has no automated test. Create a test that validates the check runs correctly with both valid and expired JWTs using temp files.

queue.title: Add directive-audit.py unit tests
queue.description: scripts/directive-audit.py (extracted R#306 from 25-directive-audit.sh) has no test file. Add directive-audit.test.py or directive-audit.test.mjs covering: extract_session_data with synthetic logs, each check function with known tool_names/text/file_edits, run_audit end-to-end with temp directives.json, CLI argument validation.

queue.title: Add DI fetchFn parameter to computeProbeDepth and probeTldVariants
queue.description: service-liveness.mjs checkUrl now accepts fetchFn for testability (wq-809), but computeProbeDepth and probeTldVariants still hardcode safeFetch. Add the same DI pattern so all three can be tested with local servers. Would enable full probe-depth test coverage.

outcome.note: Added fetchFn DI param to computeProbeDepth and probeTldVariants. 3 placeholder tests replaced with 13 real tests covering L1-L4 depth, TLD probing, error handling.

queue.title: Add todo-scan exclusion for placeholder-pattern arrays
queue.description: 27-todo-scan.sh flagged credential-health-check.mjs:22 as a TODO because the PLACEHOLDER_PATTERNS array contains 'xxx' and 'TODO' strings. These are detection patterns, not actual TODOs. Add filter to exclude string literals inside arrays (lines matching /['"](xxx|TODO|REPLACE_ME)['"]/) to prevent future false positives.

queue.title: Add DI to engage-orchestrator.mjs CLI handlers (--record-outcome, --circuit-status)
queue.description: The remaining CLI handlers in engage-orchestrator.mjs still use process.argv and process.exit directly. Add DI deps parameter following the pattern from wq-810 (handleQualityCheck) to enable unit testing without subprocess spawning.
